 - name: Get latest Run ID
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # RUN_ID=$(gh run list --workflow "Workflow A" --status success --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')
          # echo "LATEST_ID=$RUN_ID" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          # echo "RUN_ID: $RUN_ID"
          # # Get the ID

          RUN_ID=$(gh run list --workflow "Workflow A" --status success --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')
          
          # Check if RUN_ID is empty or "null"
          if [ -z "$RUN_ID" ] || [ "$RUN_ID" == "null" ]; then
            echo "::error::No successful runs of 'Workflow A' found. Please run Workflow A first."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "LATEST_ID=$RUN_ID" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "Found Run ID: $RUN_ID"
